holdings.infoBox: EZA is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are AngloGold Ashanti stock at 12.04%, Naspers at 10.14%, Gold Fields at 9.08%, FirstRand at 7.45%, and Standard Bank Group at 6.56%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI South Africa ETF (EZA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI South Africa 25-50 index. The fund tracks the performance of a market-cap-weighted index of South African stocks. It captures 85% of the publicly available market, excluding all small-caps. EZA was launched on Feb 3, 2003 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.text: South Africa's government said on ‌Tuesday that it would lower its fuel levy for two more months to the end of ​June, cushioning the impact of the ​Iran war by stopping domestic fuel prices ⁠from risi...

data.title: South African Stocks Show Life After an Election and Power-Grid Fixes
data.text: Still, there's a long way to go as the country tries to end corruption, dysfunction, and high unemployment with a coalition government. Bond yields are down and stocks are up.

data.title: South Africa's Beaten-Down Stocks Deserve a Second Look
data.text: South Africa beat back a Covid spike earlier this year, state finances remain tight, and stocks are poised for a post-pandemic recovery.
